div.head: 46. Editorial Note
div.p: On January 16, 1959, Secretary McElroy and General Twining briefed the Senate Foreign Relations Committee in executive session on the state of U.S. military defenses. A 93-page typescript record of this briefing is in the National Archives and Records Administration, RG 46, Records of the United States Senate Committee on Foreign Relations. The transcript is printed in Executive Sessions of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee (Historical Series), 1959, pages 17–53.
